creator: nenoro@live.fr
text:
Created attachment 244768
evince comes with totem and nautilus

Hello

Another issue nobody has reported, i don't use a DE but a VM, i like evince for being a KISS.

However the binary pulls totem and nautilus while it shouldn't.

Is there a way to prevent it without constantly compiling because i will update the system by using pkg update to avoid to compile one by one each package.
